stated_strategic_priorities: Maximize permanent-capital share of AUM to deliver predictable, non-redemption-sensitive management fee streams
Scale direct lending and real estate credit platforms through captive origination and insurance-channel distribution
Grow GP Strategic Capital franchise as differentiated moat — providing minority-stake capital to mid-market and large-cap GPs

contextual_market_factors.tam_notes: Blue Owl operates across the ~$1.7T global private credit market (direct lending ~$800B) and the ~$500B GP stakes/strategic capital niche. Insurance capital allocation to private credit is a secular tailwind, with insurers projected to grow private credit allocations from ~5% to ~15% of general accounts by 2028.
contextual_market_factors.governance_notes: Dual-class share structure concentrates voting control with co-founders Marc Lipschultz, Michael Rees, and Doug Ostrover. Altimeter Growth Corp. was the SPAC vehicle for the 2021 listing. Governance structure insulates management from activist pressure but may constrain governance-sensitive institutional allocators.
contextual_market_factors.regulatory_notes: Subject to SEC Investment Advisers Act. Insurance-channel growth depends on state-level insurance regulation and NAIC capital-charge treatment for private credit allocations. BDC products regulated under the Investment Company Act of 1940.
